headline: Bernstein Initiates NextEra Energy (NEE) with a Bullish View. Here is Why
summary: NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) is included among the 13 Best Electrical Infrastructure Stocks to Buy in 2026. With a market cap of almost $181 billion as of the writing of this article, NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) is the most valuable utility company in the world. The company boasts a diverse mix of energy sources, including […]
